reforms.description: The Chilean government is implementing targeted policies to support SMEs in adopting digital tools, which is essential for increasing productivity and competitiveness in the digital economy.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating the adoption of digital tools, SMEs can enhance their productivity and competitiveness, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Targeted policies for SMEs, such as development of sources of financing or specific programmes for adopting digital tools, would help them access and use digital tools.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is significant as it addresses the specific needs of SMEs in the context of digital transformation, which is crucial for their survival and growth.
reforms.source_quote: Targeted policies for SMEs, such as development of sources of financing or specific programmes for adopting digital tools, would help them access and use digital tools.

reforms.description: Chile is implementing a recovery plan that includes a public investment plan, hiring subsidies, and support for SMEs to promote private investment and economic reactivation post-COVID-19.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The plan aims to stimulate economic activity and job creation, which can enhance productivity and innovation in the SME sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The national agreement led to a new emergency plan to support the economy.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change aimed at revitalizing the economy and addressing the impacts of the pandemic, with broad implications for employment and productivity.
reforms.source_quote: A national agreement achieved between the government and political parties lead to a new emergency plan in June 2020 to support the economy for the forthcoming two years.

reforms.description: The government has increased the capital of the guarantee fund for SMEs to provide more state-guaranteed credits and extended the repayment period for existing credits.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing access to credit for SMEs, this reform supports business continuity and growth, which is essential for economic recovery.
reforms.status_evidence: The capital of the guarantee fund for SMEs has been increased, and loans have been granted to finance labor capital.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform significantly enhances the financial support available to SMEs, which are crucial for job creation and economic dynamism.
reforms.source_quote: The capital of the guarantee fund for SMEs (Fogape) has been increased by USD 3 000 million.

reforms.description: The government aims to expand R&D support programmes that have proven effective while closing down or adjusting those that are inefficient, as part of a broader strategy to enhance innovation capacity.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing effective R&D funding is expected to enhance innovation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The government announced plans to expand R&D support programmes.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant adjustment to existing R&D funding mechanisms, aiming to improve their effectiveness and relevance.
reforms.source_quote: Expand R&D support programmes that are proven to work, and close down or adjust inefficient ones.

reforms.description: Chile plans to increase business R&D expenditures from 0.1% to 0.3% of GDP, aiming to enhance innovation and competitiveness in the economy.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D funding is expected to stimulate innovation, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has announced plans to increase business R&D expenditures.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant increase in public investment in R&D, which is crucial for fostering innovation and enhancing the overall competitiveness of the economy.
reforms.source_quote: Increase business R&D expenditures from 0.1% to 0.3% of GDP.

reforms.description: Chile has implemented various programmes to enhance digital skills among students, including initiatives that provide laptops and mobile broadband to public school students, aiming to improve their ICT capabilities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving digital skills is essential for workforce readiness in a digital economy, which can enhance productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The programmes have been extended and are actively providing resources to students.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to address digital skills gaps among students, which is crucial for future economic competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: These programmes deliver a laptop computer (including mobile broadband for one year) to each student in all public schools and vulnerable and good students in subsidized schools.

reforms.description: The Data Observatory Foundation in Chile aims to provide large datasets for science and industry, facilitating the development of algorithms and training the next generation of data scientists.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing data availability and training, the initiative supports innovation and competitiveness in data-driven sectors.
reforms.status_evidence: The foundation seeks to make available large datasets for science and industry.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative is significant for fostering a data-driven economy and enhancing the skill set of future professionals.
reforms.source_quote: The Data Observatory Foundation seeks to make available large datasets for science and industry to develop algorithms and train the next generation of data scientists in the country.

reforms.description: Chile has introduced a generous R&D tax credit that can be carried forward indefinitely, aimed at increasing the number of SMEs engaging in R&D activities. The government is considering making the incentive refundable to further support small and young innovative firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The R&D tax credit incentivizes firms to invest in research and development, which can lead to increased innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The take-up of the programme has increased in the last decade, benefiting mostly large firms.
reforms.importance_rationale: The R&D tax credit is a significant policy tool aimed at enhancing R&D investment among firms, particularly SMEs, which is crucial for fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: One of the main instruments to foster innovation is a generous R&D tax credit that can be carried forward indefinitely.

reforms.description: The Ministry of Science, Technology and Innovation was created in 2019 to enhance the coordination and effectiveness of policies aimed at promoting science, technology, and innovation in Chile.
reforms.package_name: Ministry of Science, Technology and Innovation Establishment
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of a dedicated ministry is expected to streamline innovation policies and improve their implementation, thereby enhancing overall innovation capacity.
reforms.status_evidence: The Ministry was created in 2019 for advising and collaborating with the Presidency in the design, formulation, coordination, implementation and evaluation of policies.
reforms.importance_rationale: The creation of the Ministry represents a structural change in the governance of innovation policy, aiming to enhance coherence and effectiveness across various initiatives.
reforms.source_quote: In a welcome move, the Ministry of Science, Technology and Innovation was created in 2019 for advising and collaborating with the Presidency in the design, formulation, coordination, implementation and evaluation of policies aimed at promoting and strengthening science, technology and innovation.

reforms.description: The Chilean government launched the 'Digitaliza tu Pyme' program aimed at creating awareness, delivering training, and fostering the adoption of digital tools among SMEs, with a goal to digitalize 250,000 SMEs by 2022.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing digital capabilities among SMEs, the program aims to improve productivity and competitiveness, which can lead to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The aim is to digitalise 250 thousand SMEs by 2022.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to enhance the digital capabilities of a large segment of the economy, which is crucial for overall productivity and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The aim is to digitalise 250 thousand SMEs by 2022.

reforms.description: The Chilean authorities are implementing a reform of the permitting process to increase efficiency and transparency, which includes the establishment of a digital platform for tracking permits.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining the permitting process is expected to lower barriers to entry for SMEs, fostering competition and innovation in the market.
reforms.status_evidence: Authorities have also put in place a portal to denounce bureaucratic obstacles to SME entrepreneurship.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in how permits are processed, which is critical for enhancing the business environment and supporting innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Authorities have also put in place a portal to denounce bureaucratic obstacles to SME entrepreneurship.

reforms.description: The Start-Up Chile program is being amplified to increase support for start-ups from 180 to 400, including a regional acceleration initiative to ensure representation from outside the capital city.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing support for start-ups, the program aims to enhance innovation, create jobs, and diversify the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: Authorities are increasing the number of start-ups supported by the programme from 180 to 400.
reforms.importance_rationale: This expansion represents a significant structural change in the support for start-ups, aiming to enhance the entrepreneurial ecosystem in Chile.
reforms.source_quote: The programme is now being amplified. Authorities are increasing the number of start-ups supported by the programme from 180 to 400.

reforms.description: The Ministry of Finance announced plans to develop regulation for the Fintech sector, aiming to balance opportunities and risks while promoting investment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Regulating the Fintech sector is expected to enhance financial inclusion and innovation, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Ministry of Finance has announced it would work with the Financial Stability Council to develop regulation for the industry.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant regulatory change aimed at fostering innovation in the financial sector, which is crucial for the growth of the economy.
reforms.source_quote: The Ministry of Finance has announced it would work with the Financial Stability Council to develop regulation for the industry.

reforms.description: Chile is reforming its adult lifelong learning system to enhance training opportunities for vulnerable workers, including the introduction of a minimum co-payment for courses and a focus on aligning training with labor market needs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving the quality and relevance of training, the reform aims to enhance the skills of the workforce, thereby increasing productivity and employability.
reforms.status_evidence: The authorities have submitted a reform to modernize SENCE.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the training system, aiming to address systemic issues and improve workforce skills, which is crucial for economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The authorities have submitted a reform to modernize SENCE. The bill seeks to finance courses through SENCE under the requirement of certain employability measures.

reforms.description: Chile's implementation of the Digital Transformation of the State Law aims to digitalise interactions between citizens and the government, simplifying procedures and enhancing service quality.
reforms.component_name: Digital Transformation of the State Law
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances government efficiency and service delivery, potentially increasing citizen satisfaction and trust in public services.
reforms.status_evidence: The law has been enacted and is currently being implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This law represents a significant structural change in how the government interacts with citizens, aiming to modernize public service delivery and improve overall governance.
reforms.source_quote: The ongoing implementation of the Digital Transformation of the State Law promises to digitalise interactions between Chileans and the government.

reforms.description: Chile's 2022 Cybersecurity plan aims to establish a robust information infrastructure to manage digital security risks and promote a cybersecurity culture.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improves the resilience of the digital economy and enhances trust in digital services, which is crucial for economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan has been outlined and is set to be implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the plan builds on existing frameworks and aims to enhance cybersecurity measures rather than overhaul the entire system.
reforms.source_quote: Chile recently took steps in that direction with the 2022 Cybersecurity plan, which aims at establishing a robust and resilient information infrastructure.

reforms.description: Chile aims to foster a collaborative digital innovation ecosystem by strengthening business collaboration and promoting open-innovation practices, addressing the low R&D and innovation expenditure, particularly in SMEs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing collaboration and innovation among businesses can lead to increased R&D investment and improved productivity in the digital economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The recommendation to foster a collaborative digital innovation ecosystem was made in the OECD Economic Survey.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform addresses a significant gap in R&D and innovation expenditure in SMEs, which is crucial for enhancing the overall innovation capacity of the economy.
reforms.source_quote: Foster a collaborative digital innovation ecosystem by strengthening business collaboration and fostering open-innovation practices.

reforms.description: Chile plans to boost public support to SMEs in cooperation with the private sector through targeted programmes to facilitate the adoption of digital tools, addressing the lag in digital tool adoption compared to other OECD countries.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating the adoption of digital tools, this initiative is expected to enhance productivity and competitiveness among SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: The recommendation to boost public support to SMEs was made in the OECD Economic Survey.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it targets a critical area of improvement for SMEs, which are essential for economic growth and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Boost public support to SMEs, in cooperation with the private sector, through targeted programmes to facilitate the adoption of digital tools.
